prediction.chief_complaint: insomnia for two months with difficulty falling asleep and frequent awakenings

medications.name: melatonin
medications.frequency: about 30 minutes before bedtime for two weeks

plan: melatonin 3 mg approximately 30 minutes before bedtime for two weeks
implement sleep hygiene: no caffeine after noon
remove phones from bed and establish wind-down routine one hour before bedtime
maintain consistent wake time even on weekends
start CBT-I app for long-term treatment
message clinic in 4 weeks for reassessment
if sleep not improving in 4 weeks, may consider trazodone short term

follow_up.reason: reassess sleep quality and consider trazodone if not improving
